prompt: Hey I built a Python CLI called db-snap - it takes PostgreSQL and MySQL database snapshots and can restore them. Uses a YAML config at ~/.db-snap/config.yml. Main flags are --database, --output, --restore, and --compress. The project is just a flat directory with main.py, snapshot.py, restore.py, config.py, and requirements.txt. I want a simple landing page for it.

assertions.name: has-monorepo-structure
assertions.description: Output includes packages/ directory with cli and website subdirectories

assertions.name: has-global-css-theme
assertions.description: global.css uses Tailwind v4 @theme directive with color tokens

assertions.name: has-hero-section
assertions.description: index.astro has a hero section with the tool name 'db-snap'

assertions.name: mentions-postgres-mysql
assertions.description: Website mentions PostgreSQL and MySQL support

assertions.name: has-usage-examples
assertions.description: Usage section shows CLI examples with flags like --database, --output, --restore, --compress

assertions.name: has-config-section
assertions.description: Has a config section showing YAML config format

assertions.name: has-overhang-pattern
assertions.description: Hero terminal uses negative margin overhang pattern

assertions.name: has-install-command
assertions.description: Shows pip install or similar Python installation method

assertions.name: has-terminal-component
assertions.description: Has dark terminal component with bg-inverse-surface styling

assertions.name: has-updated-agents-md
assertions.description: Root AGENTS.md mentions the website package
